response: A 45-year-old female patient has a BMI of 27.3, indicating overweight status, and elevated blood pressure (138/88 mmHg), which suggests prehypertension. Her cholesterol level is 225 mg/dL (borderline high), and fasting glucose is 110 mg/dL (prediabetic range). She does not smoke, exercises 2 times per week, and has a family history of diabetes (mother), increasing her risk for metabolic disorders.
